subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Beauty of ABHA! Your long letter and the letter written by the maidservant of God came to hand... O thou Janabi Khan! Exhort thou all the believers
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی نامه مفصل شما با نامه امة الله روحانیه خانم واصل گردید دلیل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @growth of the Cause
